seoTitle: Dolls Point vs Dolphin Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dolls Point and Dolphin Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Dolls Point vs Dolphin Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dolls Point and Dolphin Point.
heading: Dolls Point vs Dolphin Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dolls Point, New South Wales and Dolphin Point, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dolls Point has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Dolphin Point (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dolls Point or Dolphin Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dolls Point has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Dolphin Point scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dolls Point scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Dolphin Point scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dolls Point or Dolphin Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dolls Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
